hero.title:
The Future of Your

Restaurant
hero.subtitle: A complete management ecosystem that connects kitchen, service, and guests into one smooth operation. QR, KDS, and analytics in one place.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: We believe restaurant technology should fuel creativity, not create barriers. We’re building an open, intuitive system so you can focus on food and people.
mission.goalsBody: Smarter staff time through intelligent order queuing and streamlined information flow.
mission.sustainBody: Less waste through better planning and transparent operational data.

pillars.title: Who are we building the future for?
pillars.ownersBody: Full control over finances, margin, and staff from anywhere in real time.
pillars.staffBody: An intuitive interface that cuts order errors and improves kitchen communication.
pillars.guestsBody: Modern ordering, loyalty, and easy payments at the table.

precision.title: Precision in every pixel
precision.body: More than tables and lists — visual tools for the floor, dish status in real time, and fast responses to guest needs.
precision.qrBody: From table to kitchen in a fraction of a second.
precision.kdsBody: See every course progress on the kitchen display.

community.title: Powered by the community
community.body: Restorio grows as an open-core project. Join the community shaping standards for hospitality tech.

finalCta.title: Ready to transform your restaurant?
finalCta.subtitle: Start a free trial and see the ecosystem in action.
finalCta.loggedSubtitle: Pick an app from the menu or head straight to your panel.

hero.title: The Future of Restaurant Management
hero.subtitle: A multi-tenant SaaS platform empowering restaurants with QR code ordering, real-time kitchen management, and comprehensive analytics.

features.title: Everything you need to run your restaurant
features.subtitle: From QR code ordering to kitchen management, Restorio provides a complete solution for modern restaurants.

waiterless.title: Waiterless Ordering
waiterless.description: Customers scan QR codes to browse menus and place orders directly from their phones.

kitchen.title: Real-time Kitchen
kitchen.description: Live order updates and kitchen display system to streamline food preparation.

multiLocation.title: Multi-Location
multiLocation.description: Manage multiple restaurant locations from a single unified dashboard.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your restaurant?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Restorio to streamline their operations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Empowering small restaurants with enterprise-grade tools.
mission.description: We believe in the democratization of technology. For years, advanced SaaS systems were reserved for large chains. Restorio changes the game, providing innovative solutions that allow local venues to compete at the highest level without a financial barrier. We focus on the engineering of tomorrow, so the heart of your restaurant beats with the rhythm of technology.

multiLocation.title: Multi-location Support
multiLocation.description: Manage your entire ecosystem from a single dashboard.

secure.title: Secure & Scalable
secure.description: Infrastructure ready for your dynamic growth.

costEfficient.title: Cost Efficient
costEfficient.description: The best quality-to-price ratio on the market.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: This project is built as an academic engineer-degree project at NTNU. The codebase is open-source, and we encourage contributions from the community. By making restaurant technology accessible, we aim to support small businesses in their digital transformation.

problem.title: Why are we doing this?
problem.description: Traditional restaurant operations are labor-intensive and prone to inefficiencies. Small to medium-sized restaurants often lack the resources to adopt enterprise-level technology, leading to manual order-taking, kitchen miscommunication, and limited scalability. Existing SaaS solutions are expensive and not tailored for smaller establishments.

manual.title: Manual Process Problem
manual.description: Many owners still rely on paper and memory. Order errors, kitchen chaos, and lack of transparency cost time and money that small restaurants cannot afford to lose.

cost.title: Cost Barrier
cost.description: Existing Enterprise-class solutions are often unaffordable or require complex infrastructure. Restorio eliminates these obstacles, offering lightness and scalability.

users.title: Who are we building the future for?
users.subtitle: Three pillars of success for every modern restaurant.

owners.title: Restaurant Owners
owners.description: Full control over margins, inventory, and real-time sales analytics.

staff.title: Staff & Kitchen
staff.description: No more unreadable tickets. A clear KDS system for smooth operation.

customers.title: End Customers
customers.description: Fast ordering, secure payments, and a modern experience.

engineering.title: Engineering Focus
engineering.frontend: Modern React frontends with TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.
engineering.backend: FastAPI (Python) with JWT authentication and PostgreSQL database.
engineering.realtime: WebSocket support for live order updates and kitchen displays.
engineering.deployment: Dockerized microservices ready for cloud deployment.

footer.description: A modern, multi-tenant restaurant management platform designed for the future of dining.
footer.copyright: © {year} Restorio Platform. Open Source Academic Project.
